---
title: "TODO Report an LMM"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source('../assets/setup.R')
```

lorem ipsum

follow APA and use $b$ in the in-text reporting of specific coefs (unless standardised in which case we write $\beta$), but we can use $\beta$ as usual in the model expression bc technically that's the population model, and we like to use Greek for population stuff and non-Greek for sample stuff.




## Linked flash cards

### Outgoing links

- TODO


### Backlinks

- TODO
